text: Subah MNC se layoff ka termination email padhte hi mere seene mein ek bhayankar jakdan aur ghutan shuru ho gayi hai. Gaon mein kisan baap ne karz lekar shehar bheja tha taaki main sarkari naukri na sahi par shehar mein settle ho jaun, par ab is khabar se dimaag ki nasen fatne ko ho rahi hain. Mere hath-pair thande pad gaye hain aur gala itna sookh gaya hai ki subah ki chai tak nigli nahi ja rahi.

Startup se nikalne ki khabar milte hi mere kandhon aur peeth mein ek aisi aithan shuru ho gayi hai jo rukne ka naam nahi le rahi. Ghar par remittance bhejne ka bojh hai aur is metro isolation mein mere sar mein itna bhari dard hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai. Mujhe lagatar chakkar aa rahe hain aur poora jism aisi jalan se toot raha hai jaise andar hi andar bukhar chadh raha ho.

Jabse termination mail dekha hai, mere pet mein aisi marod aur jalan uthi hai ki main PG ke kamre se bahar bhi nahi nikal pa raha hoon. Barson sarkari naukri ki coaching fail hone ke baad ye private naukri hi ek sahara thi, par ab is nakami se mere dimaag mein ek zor ki seeti baj rahi hai. Mere ghutne dard se kaanp rahe hain aur lag raha hai mera poora physical system collapse ho jayega.

Email padhte hi mere gale mein ek ajeeb sa gola phans gaya hai aur meri aawaz bilkul baith gayi hai, language gap ki wajah se pehle hi akela tha aur ab ye layoff ne dam ghont diya hai. Ghar ki EMI aur kirana shop ka karz kaise chukega ye soch kar mere hatho ki ungliyan sunn ho gayi hain. Dil itni zor se dhadak raha hai ki seena cheer kar bahar aa jayega aur mujhe saans lene mein bahut takleef ho rahi hai.

Layoff ki news sunte hi mere pure badan mein aisi thakan aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai ki lag raha hai mera sharir jawaab de raha hai. Pehle hi sarkari naukri na milne ka darr tha aur ab ye private job chali gayi toh mere sar mein hathode jaisa dard ho raha hai. Is bheed wale shehar mein khud ko akela pa kar mere pet mein aisi jalan ho rahi hai jo sidhe gale tak aa rahi hai.
